_researchNotes: Bark.com purchased/unlocked-lead email. After a seller spends credits to respond, Bark reveals the customer's full contact details: 'when you pay to respond to a lead you'll get the customer's phone number and email' (help.bark.com 'responding to leads' topic; same mechanic described by ring4.com/blog/bark-thumbtack-lead-response-guide and sidehusl.com/bark: contact info = 'the potential client's name, phone number and email address'). Sellers 'can respond to the customer directly through the email sent with their job details' and 'when you click contact, the phone number and email will be revealed' (help.bark.com search snippets). Zapier's native Bark integration has a separate 'New Purchased Bark' trigger, confirming the purchased lead is a distinct, fuller record. Body therefore carries labeled Name/Phone/Email lines plus a recap of the lead's Q&A. Date here is US numeric MM/DD/YYYY to cover the ambiguous-format edge case. Sender remains team@bark.com.
subject: You've responded to Maya R.
textBody:
Hi Demo DJ Co,

Great news! Here are Maya's contact details.

Name: Maya Rodriguez
Phone: (512) 555-0184
Email: maya.rodriguez@example.net

Give Maya a call or drop her an email to introduce your business. Customers are most likely to hire professionals who respond within an hour.

Lead details

What type of event is it?
Wedding

When is the event?
11/14/2026

Approximately how many guests will attend?
100 - 149

What is your budget?
$750 - $1,000

View this lead: https://www.bark.com/sellers/leads/812345/

--
Bark.com Global Limited, 85 Great Portland Street, London, W1W 7LT
